zh.lifeSummary: 當Phillip Perry於1661年出生在英國英格蘭戴文布藍斯可姆時，他的父親William Perry49歲，母親Joan Spencer32歲。他和Eleanor Barrett至少有3個兒子和4個女兒。他去世於1731年9月10日在他的家鄉享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Phillip Perry于1661年出生在英国英格兰戴文布藍斯可姆时，他的父亲William Perry49岁，母亲Joan Spencer32岁。他和Eleanor Barrett至少有3个儿子和4个女儿。他去世于1731年9月10日在他的家乡享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: Perry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh: Anglicized form of Welsh ap Herry ‘son of Herry’, a variant of the personal name Harry (see Harris ).

English: topographic name for someone who lived near a pear tree (Middle English piri(e), peri(e), puri(e), Old English pirige, pyrige), or a habitational name for someone who owned or came from a place so named. This surname and a number of variants have been established in Ireland since the 17th century.

variants.name: Peery
meanings: Irish: variant of   Perry  , taken to Ireland at the time of thePlantation of Ulster and in the Cromwellian period.

variants.name: Pear
meanings: English: topographic name from residence by a pear tree (Middle English pere, Old English peru, pere). Compare Perry .
English: nickname from Middle English pere, Old French per, peer ‘peer or paragon’, also ‘companion’.

variants.name: Peary
meanings: History: Robert E. Peary (1856–1920) was a U.S.-born explorer, who in 1909 led the first successful expedition to the North Pole. Peary Land in the north of Greenland is named after him, as he explored there in 1892 and 1900.

variants.name: Perrie
meanings: Scottish: variant of Perry 2. Alternatively, perhaps from the Old French personal name Pierre; see Pierce .

variants.name: Harris
meanings: English (southern England and south Wales): from the personal name Harry + genitival -s. This surname is also established in Ireland, taken there principally during the Plantation of Ulster. However, in some cases, particularly in families coming from County Mayo, Harris can be an Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó hEarchadha. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

American shortened and altered form of Greek surnames begining with Cha(r)-, such as Chasandrinos (variant of Kassandrinos, a habitational name from the Kassandra peninsula of Chalkidiki), and various patronymics from the personal name Charalampos (see Charos ). In North America, the surname Harris may possibly also originate from a transferred use of the Greek personal (given) name Charis or Harris (shortened forms of Charalampos) as a surname (i.e. as a replacement of the original surname).
Americanized form of various like-sounding Jewish surnames.

variants.name: Perryman
meanings: English (Devon): elaborated form of Perry , with Middle English man, probably denoting one who lived near a pear tree; see Pearman .

nameMeanings.name: Phillip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Philip , in part a reflection of the surname, which is usually spelled Phillips.

en.lifeSummary: When Phillip Perry was born in 1661, in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, William Perry, was 49 and his mother, Joan Spencer, was 32. He had at least 3 sons and 4 daughters with Eleanor Barrett. He died on 10 September 1731, in his hometown, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Phillip Perry est né en 1661, à Branscombe, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Perry, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Joan Spencer, avait 32 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles avec Eleanor Barrett. Il est décédé le 10 septembre 1731, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Phillip Perry 1661 in Branscombe, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Perry 49 und seine Mutter Joan Spencer 32. Er hatte mit Eleanor Barrett mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. September 1731 im Alter von 70 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip Perry è nato il nel 1661 nel Branscombe, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, William Perry, aveva 49 anni e il suo madre, Joan Spencer, aveva 32 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie con Eleanor Barrett. Morì il 10 settembre 1731, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Phillip Perryが1661年にイギリスイギリスデボンブランスコンベで生まれた時，父William Perryは49歳，母Joan Spencerは32歳であった。彼はEleanor Barrettとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼は1731年9月10日に故郷で70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Phillip Perry(이)가 1661년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 브랜스코브에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Perry(은)는 49세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Spencer(은)는 32세였다. 그는 Eleanor Barrett(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1731년 9월 10일 그의 고향에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Phillip Perry nasceu em 1661, em Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Perry, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Joan Spencer, tinha 32 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas com Eleanor Barrett. Ele faleceu em 10 de setembro de 1731, em sua cidade natal, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Phillip Perry родился в 1661 г. в местности бранскомб, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William Perry было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Spencer, 32. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери от Eleanor Barrett. Он умер 10 сентября 1731 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Phillip Perry nació en 1661, en Branscombe, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Perry, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Joan Spencer, tenía 32 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas con Eleanor Barrett. Murió el 10 de septiembre de 1731, en su pueblo, a la edad de 70 años.
